docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,971.96 FILED BY O'NEILL, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT HYATT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY O'NEILL, DANIEL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'NEILL, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT HYATT CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-29-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HYATT CORPORATION
CHALLANGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT HYATT CORPORATION AS TO PLAINTIFF O'NEILL, DANIEL
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DANIEL O'NEILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HYATT CORORATION IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO THE JURIDICTION OF THIS COURT AS SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT THE PROPER VENUE IS GRANTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
